mapper.sql: select d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.leader, d.phone, d.email, d.status, d.del_flag, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.score, d.is_show, d.type,d.is_read from sys_dept d
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user where dept_id = #{deptId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from sys_dept where del_flag = '0' and parent_id = #{deptId} limit 1
select * from sys_dept where find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors)
select count(*) from sys_dept where status = 0 and del_flag = '0' and find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors)

select.where:
AND dept_name like concat('%', #{deptName}, '%')
AND is_read like concat('%', #{isRead}, '%')
and status=0

mapper.select: SELECT distinct dept_id, dept_name, order_num, parent_id FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = 0
SELECT distinct dept_id, dept_name, order_num, parent_id FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND dept_name LIKE '%营%' AND del_flag = 0 AND STATUS = 0 ORDER BY order_num asc

SELECT distinct dept_id, dept_name, order_num, parent_id FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
AND del_flag = 0 AND STATUS = 0 ORDER BY order_num asc
SELECT distinct dept_id, dept_name, order_num, parent_id FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND del_flag = 0 AND STATUS = 0 ORDER BY order_num asc

SELECT distinct a.dept_id as deptId, a.dept_name as deptName, a.order_num as orderNum, a.parent_id as parentId FROM sys_dept a,sys_dept b WHERE a.parent_id = b.dept_id AND a.dept_name LIKE '%营%' AND a.del_flag = 0 AND a.STATUS = 0 ORDER BY a.order_num
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dept( dept_id, parent_id, dept_name, ancestors, order_num, leader, phone, email, status, create_by, score, is_show, type, is_read, create_time )values( #{deptId}, #{parentId}, #{deptName}, #{ancestors}, #{orderNum}, #{leader}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{score}, #{isShow}, #{type}, #{isRead}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update sys_dept set status = '0' where dept_id in
#{deptId}
mapper.delete: update sys_dept set del_flag = '2' where dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.select: select dept_id from sys_dept where parent_id = #{deptId} and del_flag = '0' and status = '0' and is_show = 'Y'
select dept_id from sys_dept where parent_id = #{deptId}

select dept_id from sys_dept where parent_id in
#{id}
